invite.emailContent:
{{inviter}} invites you to Hackers' Pub!

Hackers' Pub is a place for software engineers to share their knowledge and experience with each other. It's also an ActivityPub-enabled social network, so you can follow your favorite hackers in the fediverse and get their latest posts in your feed.

To accept the invitation, click the following link:

{{verifyUrl}}

This link will expire in {{expiration}}.

actionTaken.emailSubject: A moderation action was taken on your Hackers' Pub account

resultNames.withdrawn: Appeal upheld: the decision was withdrawn
resultNames.reduced: Appeal upheld: the sanction was reduced
resultNames.increased: Appeal reviewed: the sanction was increased

appealResolved.emailSubject: Your Hackers' Pub appeal has been reviewed
